body.title: CC walk: Igor sweeps 3 hardcoded Igor-wild-0001 refs
body.result: Target T-hardcoded-instance-refs-cleanup already done (pe_chain autonomous: pass). Walk admin close.
body.description:
Target: T-hardcoded-instance-refs-cleanup. Discovery-first ticket — run audit_runner to find the 3 refs, then fix.

Checklist:
1. Run: audit_runner --drain (or grep -rn 'Igor-wild-0001' wild_igor/igor/ | grep -v __pycache__)
2. Find the 3 non-exempt hits
3. Replace with paths().instance_id or equivalent env var
4. Confirm audit check passes
5. Commit + close target

**Affected files:** TBD (discovery)
**Design rules:** none
**Scope boundary:** IN — 3 specific hardcoded refs
**Test plan:** audit passes.
